text:
Wald may refer to:
Wald - A noble from the Attack on Titan anime.
Wald - A hired thug who appears in the OVA Wall Sina, Goodbye: Part Two.
Wald Richter - A hired thug who appears in the visual novel Wall Sina, Goodbye as well as the Attack on Titan: Lost Girls novel and manga.
Wald and Lou - The 3rd chapter of the Attack on Titan: Lost Girls manga.
